observation: I can see the page has a residence selection form. There's a 'Select' dropdown field for Country/region at element 45 and a Next button at element 439. I can also see many country options in the list, including Indonesia at element 183/184 which was previously selected. The country dropdown appears to be closed currently and showing placeholder text 'Select'.
reasoning: As a normal user, I need to select a country from the dropdown to proceed with the registration. Since the dropdown is currently closed (showing 'Select' placeholder), I need to tap on it first to open the country list options.

dual_diagnosis.visual_observation: Country/region dropdown successfully opened, displaying a searchable list of countries including Guinea-Bissau, Guyana, Haiti, Honduras, Hungary, Iceland, India, Indonesia, Iraq, Ireland, Israel, Italy, Jamaica, Japan, and Kazakhstan with their respective flag icons. A search field is visible at the top of the dropdown.
